name: Steamed Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice well.
2. Combine the rice with water and salt (if using) in an 8-cup microwaveable casserole.
3. Cover the casserole and microwave at high for 5 minutes.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and continue microwaving for 8 to 12 minutes, or until most of the water is absorbed.
5. Let the rice stand covered for 5 to 10 minutes to absorb any remaining liquid.
